name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.RollDownStairsHelper.MinAngVel
summary: Only used if applyNewRollingCheatingTorques or applyHelPerTorqueToAlign defined to true : minimal angular velocity of the roll to apply cheating torques.
remarks:
Default value = 0.5f.
            Min value = 0.0f.
            Max value = 10.0f.
